title: How to unlock Characters in Evangelion Battlefileds
display_title: How to unlock Characters in Evangelion Battlefileds
wikitext:
[]: How to unlock Characters in Evangelion Battlefileds?             Quote Post by Asugran233 » Wed May 19, 2021 10:59 am Anyone know how to unlock characters and mechs in Evangelion Battlefields because I have no idea, maybe any of you played this game and knows how to unlock? All I know is that there is some blue energy but I do not know anything anymore.

[]: Re: How to unlock Characters in Evangelion Battlefileds?             Quote Post by Blockio » Wed May 19, 2021 5:15 pm To the extent of my knowledge, the only way to unlock new stuff in BF is by buying the toys to live figures

[]: Re: How to unlock Characters in Evangelion Battlefileds?             Quote Post by walucigi » Wed May 26, 2021 4:17 pm Okay so I can read a tiny bit of Japanese, so I may be able to help. When you go into the store, the ones with the gold plate or colour or whatever are only available WITH purchasing in-game currency. The ones with silver-grey plate are available to everyone with or without purchase. What you'll want to do is go to the store and press the third option that reads "コンテナ" (container) and then use your in-game currency to buy either 1 or 11 capsules. These allow you to unlock support units, pilots/pilot chips, and eva/eva chips. As to what the person above me says, its possible to buy the gold plate options along with whatever merch they provide for the season. Hope this helps!
